name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel on the floor with the ab wheel in front of you. Grasp the handles and brace your core. Slowly roll the wheel forward, extending your body while keeping your back neutral. Go as far as you can without arching your lower back. Pull the wheel back to the starting position using your abs.
form_cues: Keep your back flat — don't sag
Only go as far as you can control
Don't use your shoulders to pull — use your core
safety_notes: Start with very short range of motion and build up. If you feel lower back pain, you've gone too far. This exercise places high demand on the spine; it's not suitable for those with back issues. Use a wall to stop the wheel at a safe distance.
common_mistakes: Using the hips to pull back
source: Advanced core training and bodyweight literature
